---
pagetitle: "Contact — Your Name"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

::: {.section style="padding-top:6rem;"}
::: {.section-narrow .text-center}

[Get in Touch]{.section-label}

## Let's Connect {.section-heading}

I'm currently open to new opportunities and always happy to discuss data science, machine learning, or potential collaborations. Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.
{.section-desc style="margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;text-align:center;"}

:::
:::


::: {.section .bg-white}
::: {.section-wide}

::: {.contact-grid}

<a href="mailto:your.email@example.com" class="contact-card">
<div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></div>

### Email
your.email@example.com
</a>

<a href="https://linkedin.com/in/yourusername" class="contact-card" target="_blank">
<div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></div>

### LinkedIn
linkedin.com/in/yourusername
</a>

<a href="https://github.com/yourusername" class="contact-card" target="_blank">
<div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></div>

### GitHub
github.com/yourusername
</a>

<a href="https://twitter.com/yourusername" class="contact-card" target="_blank">
<div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i></div>

### Twitter / X
@yourusername
</a>

:::
:::
:::

::: {.section .text-center}
::: {.section-narrow}

<div style="font-size:1rem;color:var(--color-text-muted);line-height:1.8;">

**Based in:** San Francisco, CA (open to remote & relocation)

**Response time:** I typically respond within 24 hours.

**Preferred contact:** Email for professional inquiries; LinkedIn for networking.

</div>

:::
:::
